basic_details.job_title: MECON Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 103 Engineer, Asst Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: MECON Limited (A PSU under Ministry of Steel, Govt. of India)
basic_details.post_name: Contractual Engagement - Full Time Fixed Tenure (FTFT) Basis
basic_details.short_information: MECON Limited has announced the FTFT (Full Time Fixed Tenure) Recruitment 2026 for 103 posts across various engineering, technical, and administrative disciplines. Published on 23rd March 2026 at meconlimited.co.in, this new recruitment drive offers openings for eligible candidates in disciplines such as Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Mining, HR, Finance, and more. Applicants within the Age Limit Range and holding the required Educational Qualifications can apply online from 27th April 2026 to 11th May 2026. Find all details about the MECON FTFT Recruitment 2026, including eligibility, applica

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on MECON Careers page

application_fee.details: Candidates applying under UR, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer), or EWS category are required to pay a non-refundable application fee of ₹500 (Rupees Five Hundred only). Candidates belonging to SC, ST, PwD, or Ex-Servicemen categories, as well as internal MECON candidates, are fully exempted from paying any fee. | The application fee must be paid online through the payment gateway provided on MECON's official website. No other mode of payment (such as demand draft, postal order, or cash) is accepted. Once the fee is paid, candidates must click the "Verify" button to update the application status to "Submitted." Fee paid will not be refunded under any circumstances, so candidates are strongly advised to verify their eligibility before making payment. Applications submitted without fee or with insufficient fee will be rejected.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit for each post is 50 years for General (UR) and EWS category candidates, as calculated on the cut-off date of 23.03.2026. Age relaxation is provided as per Government of India guidelines. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates get a relaxation of 3 years, SC/ST candidates get 5 years, and Persons with Disabilities (PwD) get relaxation of 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC-NCL), or 15 years (SC/ST).

how_to_apply: Applications for MECON FTFT Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online only through MECON's official website (www.meconlimited.co.in → Careers → Career Opportunities → Apply Online). No offline or postal applications will be accepted. Candidates must apply between 27 April 2026 and 11 May 2026. During the online application process, candidates must upload a recent passport-size colour photograph (jpg/jpeg, max 40 KB), a signature image in blue/black ink (jpg/jpeg, max 40 KB), and self-attested PDF copies of all required documents.

If multiple documents need to be merged, they must be combined into a single PDF not exceeding 1 MB. Aadhaar Card is mandatory and must be uploaded - any mismatch between the Aadhaar number entered online and the uploaded document will result in summary rejection. No modifications are allowed after submission of the online application, so candidates must take utmost care before final submission.

Government/PSU employees must forward their application through Proper Channel or produce an NOC at the time of the interview; failure to do so means they will not be interviewed and no TA will be paid. Hard copies of the online application and all required documents must be brought on the date of the Walk-In-Interview.
Recent passport-size colour photograph (jpg/jpeg, max 40 KB)
Signature in blue/black ink (jpg/jpeg, max 40 KB)
Matriculation/Secondary Board certificate or Municipal Birth Certificate (proof of age)
Final/Provisional Graduation and Post-Graduation certificates (as applicable)
All semester/year-wise mark sheets or consolidated mark sheet
Work experience certificates/documents as per Para 6 of the notification
Caste certificate - OBC (NCL) / EWS / SC / ST (as applicable; OBC certificate not more than 1 year old)
PwD certificate in prescribed Govt. of India format (if applicable)
Income & Asset Certificate for EWS candidates as per DoPT OM No.36039/1/2019-Estt (Res) dated 31.01.2019
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All documents must be self-attested; third-party attestation is not required unless specifically mentioned. Original certificates/documents must be produced at the time of the Walk-In-Interview. No modifications are allowed after submission of the online application. Government/PSU employees must produce NOC from present employer at interview. Certificates in languages other than Hindi/English must be accompanied by a certified translation. Candidates must maintain a valid and active email ID and mobile number for at least 1 year - all future communications will be through email only. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of Ranchi (Jharkhand) only. MECON's decision in all matters relating to recruitment will be final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. How many posts have been announced in MECON Limited FTFT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: MECON Limited has announced 103 post codes for contractual engagement of experienced professionals on Full Time Fixed Tenure (FTFT) basis through Advertisement No. 11.73.4.1/2026/Cont/02 dated 23.03.2026. The posts cover a wide range of engineering, technical, and administrative positions including Additional Engineer, Deputy Engineer, Assistant Engineer in disciplines like Civil, Structural, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Planning, Safety, Quality, Mining, Mineral Processing, and also positions in HR, Finance, Administration, Contracts, Marketing, and Projects. The total number of actual vacancies across these 103 post codes is 60 positions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary range for MECON FTFT posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly pay varies by post level. Assistant Engineers and Assistant Executives receive between ₹43,880 to ₹45,050 per month, Deputy Engineers and Deputy Executives receive ₹54,990 per month, Additional Engineers and Additional Executives receive ₹66,110 to ₹67,860 per month, and Engineer (Safety) positions receive ₹78,390 per month. In addition to the consolidated pay, employees receive site allowance (7.5% of pay at site/project locations) or metro allowance (2.5% of pay at metro locations), annual increment, medical facilities, HRA at 5% if company accommodation is not availed, and various leave benefits.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for MECON FTFT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 50 years for General (UR) and EWS category candidates as calculated on the cut-off date of 23.03.2026. Age relaxation is provided as per Government of India guidelines: OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates get 3 years relaxation, SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation, PwD candidates get 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC-NCL), or 15 years (SC/ST) relaxation, and J&K domicile candidates (born between 01.01.1980 to 31.12.1989) get 5 years relaxation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for MECON FTFT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to UR (General), OBC (Non-Creamy Layer), or EWS category must pay a non-refundable application fee of ₹500 through the online payment gateway. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, PwD (Persons with Disabilities), Ex-Servicemen categories, as well as internal MECON candidates, are fully exempted from paying any application fee. The fee must be paid online only - no other mode of payment such as demand draft, postal order, or cash is accepted. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q5. What are the important dates for MECON FTFT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The advertisement was published on 23.03.2026. The online application portal opens on 27.04.2026 and the last date for submission of online applications is 11.05.2026. The cut-off date for determining age and experience eligibility is 23.03.2026. Walk-In-Interview dates will be notified separately on the MECON Careers page (careers.meconlimited.co.in) for four locations - Delhi, Ranchi, Kolkata, and Bangalore.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MECON FTFT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process is through Walk-In-Interview. Candidates must first submit their online application between 27.04.2026 and 11.05.2026. After that, they should check the MECON Careers page for Walk-In-Interview schedule (date, time, and venue). On the interview date, document scrutiny will be conducted first - if any claim in the application is found unsubstantiated, the candidate will not be allowed to appear for the interview. After successful document verification, candidates will face a personal interview. Selected candidates must undergo medical examination before joining. The final result will be published on MECON's website and communicated via registered email.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for different posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post and level. For Additional Engineer posts, B.E/B.Tech in the relevant discipline (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, etc.) with minimum 9-10 years of post-qualification experience is required. For Deputy Engineer positions, B.E/B.Tech with minimum 5 years of experience is needed. For Assistant Engineer roles, B.E/B.Tech with minimum 2 years of experience is mandatory. For one Assistant Engineer (Civil) position (Post Code 60), a Full Time Diploma in Civil Engineering with minimum 5 years of experience is required. For executive positions in HR, Finance, and Administration, relevant PG degrees/MBA/professional qualifications with specified experience are needed.

faq.question: Q8. Will traveling allowance (TA) be provided for attending the Walk-In-Interview?
faq.answer: Yes, outstation candidates appearing for the Walk-In-Interview are entitled to reimbursement of traveling allowance (TA) for to-and-fro travel by the shortest route from their mailing address to the interview venue. TA will be paid at III Tier AC (3A) / Chair Car (CC) rail fare rates, or ₹7 per km by road, whichever is less, subject to production of original tickets/receipts and/or boarding passes. Rail fare will be at regular (non-Tatkal/non-premium Tatkal) rates only. However, if any claim is found unsubstantiated during document scrutiny on the interview date, the candidate will not be interviewed and no TA will be paid.
